channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Gradle Dependency Updater - Fri May 15 17:02:34 UTC 2026
item.description:
Gradle Dependency Updater helps you keep your Gradle dependencies up to date. Features: Automatic detection of outdated dependencies in build.gradle files Alt+Enter...
vendor: Clément Hervé downloads: 25 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.clementherve.intellijjavadependencyupdaterplugin

item.title: Agent Workbench - Wed May 13 13:04:25 UTC 2026
item.description:
Run and manage AI coding agents — Codex, Claude, Junie, and more — directly inside your IDE. Quick Launch — press Cmd+\ / Ctrl+\ from anywhere to start a new task or...
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 1173 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.intellij.agent.workbench

item.title: AppGlass Debugger - Fri May 15 15:20:20 UTC 2026
item.description:
AppGlass Debugger lets you attach to running production or staging applications and inspect real execution data without redeploys, restarts, or opening debug ports...
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 25 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: LiveDebugger

item.title: Nextflow - Fri May 15 03:09:39 UTC 2026
item.description:
Nextflow language support powered by the Nextflow Language Server. Requires Java 17+.
vendor: Forest Dussault downloads: 4 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.nextflow.jetbrains

item.title: LogTrace - Fri May 15 09:59:58 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: longxianhua downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.logtrace.plugin

item.title: OpenCode UX+ GUI Only (unofficial) updates - Fri May 15 10:12:17 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: goals downloads: 4 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: goals.opencode-ux-plus-gui-only

item.title: GoDogLand BDD Runner - Thu May 14 19:30:06 UTC 2026
item.description:
GoDogLand BDD Runner adds a focused Godog/Cucumber workflow to GoLand. It lets you work with Go BDD scenarios directly from .feature files, while keeping the test...
vendor: Marcin Dryka downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: pl.godogland.bdd.runner

item.title: Bracketbow - Thu May 14 22:35:22 UTC 2026
item.description:
Colors brackets ( ), [ ], { } by nesting depth — a free, open-source alternative to Rainbow Brackets. Supports Java, Kotlin, XML, HTML, and JSON out of the box. 7...
vendor: Hakan Gunay downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.bracketbow

item.title: Cursive JS Support - Fri May 15 07:45:21 UTC 2026
item.description:
Adds JavaScript/browser API awareness to ClojureScript editing in Cursive. Removes false-positive squiggly lines on js/ globals and browser interop forms by loading...
vendor: Furkan Özdemir downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.cursivejssupport

item.title: Praise Pusher - Fri May 15 17:23:36 UTC 2026
item.description:
Turn everyday Git actions into tiny wins.
vendor: Praise Pusher downloads: 26 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.kop.praisepusher

item.title: Debug MCP Server - Fri May 15 02:56:27 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Sahil Ramagiri downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.sahil0.debugmcp

item.title: Claude Token Monitor - Fri May 15 23:50:24 UTC 2026
item.description:
Track your Claude API rate limits in real time - right from the IDE status bar. No more switching to the Anthropic console mid-session to check if you're about to hit...
vendor: nikolenkote downloads: 40 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.claudemonitor.claude-token-monitor

item.title: Awsum - Thu May 14 19:35:55 UTC 2026
item.description:
Awsum language support for IntelliJ-based IDEs. Thin LSP client to awsum lsp from the compiler. Syntax highlighting via the shared TextMate grammar.
vendor: Awsum Language downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: org.awsumlang.awsum

item.description:

vendor: MyBatis SQL Capture downloads: 34 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.github.suppermrcode.mybatis.sql.capture

item.title: OSV Vulnerability Scanner - Fri May 15 07:27:28 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: dyuti downloads: 31 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.dyuti.osvplugin
